# Test Cases (Generated) — FAL-3147

1) Verify Form Field Order
   - Navigate to the LO inquiry form
   - Assert "Property Information" section appears before "Loan Information"

2) Verify Existing Mortgage Amount Field
   - Confirm field exists and accepts numeric currency
   - Verify required validation when empty

3) Verify Checkbox Defaults
   - Confirm "Does the borrower live at this address" is checked by default
   - Confirm occupancy defaults to "Primary"

4) Visual Regression Snapshot
   - Capture screenshots of the form on desktop and mobile viewports
